channel.title: Collections on Christian Mahnke
channel.description: Recent content in Collections on Christian Mahnke

item.title: Everyday culture
item.author: mail@christianmahnke.de (Christian Mahnke)
item.description:
The main focus of my collection is on different everyday culture related artifacts from the 20th century. Since this is a quite broad area, here is a list of more particular topics:

Artifacts

  • Optical devices and toys
    • Cameras Page of the collection
  • Consumer electronics
    • Tape recorders
    • Projectors
    • Video game consoles (until 2000)
  • Hangers Page of the collection
  • Glasses
  • Airplane cutlery
  • Ceramic, glass and porcelain objects
  • Wallpapers Page of the collection

Books and printed matter

(mainly between 1890 and 1945)

item.title: Using materials and guidance
item.author: mail@christianmahnke.de (Christian Mahnke)
item.description: The source materials of my blogs as well as my printed materials can be used for your own work. Regardless of whether plan on doing a scientific work (master’s theses, doctoral theses, other publications), try to realise some creative idea (fonts, photos, etc.), exhibitions or your own web project (such as a blog, etc.), please do not hesitate to contact me. And if you are interested in one topic and still lack the right project, I will be happy to help as well.
